title: Angraecopsis confusa

taxonomy: Angraecopsis confusa is a species of orchid, which is a member of the family Orchidaceae. It is classified within the genus Angraecopsis, which is a group of epiphytic orchids native to tropical Africa. The genus Angraecopsis is further divided into several species, with Angraecopsis confusa being one of the lesser-known species. This classification helps scientists to understand the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of Angraecopsis confusa and other related species. The classification also aids in the identification and conservation of Angraecopsis confusa and its habitats.
